description: Testing set filtered to HIGH/CRITICAL GitHub-reviewed advisories that satisfy EvoHunt CVSS 4.0 criteria and Docker/script reproduction scope.

evohunt_cvss4_poc_criteria.impact: at least one of VC/VI/VA/SC/SI/SA is L or H

excluded: OpenStack or special cloud platform runtime
advisories without enough information for realistic end-to-end reproduction
advisories without a resolvable repository source
